Questions.Question: YYYY-MM-DD (Mock #)
Hints:
- What went well:
- What to improve:
- Next actions:

Questions.Question: Setup (2 min)
Hints:
- Role:
- Company:
- Level:

Questions.Question: Section A — Intro (5 min)
Hints:
- Tell me about yourself.
- Why this company?
- Why this role?

Questions.Question: Section B — Behavioral (10 min)
Hints: - 2 questions from `04_INTERVIEW_QA/behavioral_question_bank.md`

Questions.Question: Section C — Technical (15–20 min)
Hints:
- 1 coding problem (talk out loud)
- 1 deep dive question (e.g., caching, DB indexing, concurrency, messaging)

Questions.Question: Section D — Close (5 min)
Hints:
- Your questions to interviewer
- Wrap-up summary (what you bring + next steps)

Questions.Question: Scoring (after)
Hints:
- Clarity (1–5):
- Structure (1–5):
- Depth (1–5):
- Communication (1–5):
- Next actions:

Questions.Question: What to do
Hints:
- Record mock sessions (audio/video link in `recordings.md`)
- Write feedback and next improvements in `feedback.md`

Questions.Question: Script
Hints: - Use `mock_script.md` to run a consistent mock
